stream:
workflow:
  name: Gallium recycling notarization
  description: Workflow for intake, refinement, and QA of recycled gallium batches with notarized checkpoints.
  steps:
    - id: "1"
      title: Incoming intake
      order: 1
      organization: organization-1
      substeps:
        - id: "1.1"
          title: Record formata
          order: 0
          roles:
            - chemist
          inputKey: qa
          inputType: formata
          schema:
            type: object
            required: [inspectorName, result, purityScore, riskBand]
            properties:
              inspectorName:
                type: string
                title: Inspector name
              testMethod:
                type: string
                title: Test method
                enum: [xrf, icp_ms, wet_chemistry, visual_only]
              result:
                type: string
                title: QA result
                enum: [pass, conditional_pass, rework, reject]
              riskBand:
                type: string
                title: Risk band
                enum: [low, medium, high, critical]
              purityScore:
                type: number
                title: Purity score (range 0-100)
                minimum: 0
                maximum: 100
              confidenceLevel:
                type: integer
                title: Confidence level (range 1-5)
                minimum: 1
                maximum: 5
              notes:
                type: string
                title: QA notes
              evidenceFile:
                type: string
                format: data-url
                title: Evidence file
          uiSchema:
            ui:options:
              order: [inspectorName, testMethod, result, riskBand, purityScore, confidenceLevel, notes, evidenceFile]
            testMethod:
              ui:options:
                help: Select how QA validation was performed.
            riskBand:
              ui:options:
                help: Choose the risk classification for this batch.
            purityScore:
              ui:components:
                numberWidget: rangeWidget
              ui:options:
                help: Numeric range value between 0 and 100.
            confidenceLevel:
              ui:components:
                numberWidget: rangeWidget
              ui:options:
                help: Numeric range value between 1 and 5.
            notes:
              ui:components:
                textWidget: textareaWidget
              ui:options:
                help: Write a detailed QA narrative and exceptions.
            evidenceFile:
              ui:components:
                stringField: fileField
              ui:options:
                help: Upload QA evidence.
        - id: "1.2"
          title: Record incoming gallium (kg)
          order: 1
          roles:
            - mechanic
          inputKey: incomingKg
          inputType: formata
          schema:
            type: object
            properties:
              incomingKg:
                type: number
                title: incomingKg
            required:
            - incomingKg
            title: Record incoming gallium
        - id: "1.3"
          title: Attach batch ID
          order: 2
          roles:
            - supervisor
          inputKey: batchId
          inputType: formata
          schema:
            type: object
            properties:
              batchId:
                type: string
                title: batchId
            required:
              - batchId
            title: Batch ID reference
        - id: "1.4"
          title: Upload gallium certification
          order: 3
          roles:
            - supervisor
          inputKey: Gallium certification
          inputType: formata
          schema:
            type: object
            properties:
              Certification:
                title: Certification
            required:
              - Certification
            title: Gallium certification
          uiSchema:
            Certification:
              ui:components:
                unknownField: unknownNativeFileField
    - id: "2"
      title: Refinement
      order: 2
      organization: organization-2
      substeps:
        - id: "2.1"
          title: Record refined gallium output (kg)
          order: 1
          roles:
            - analyst
          inputKey: refinedKg
          inputType: formata
          schema:
            type: object
            properties:
              refinedKg:
                type: number
                title: refinedKg
            required:
            - refinedKg
            title: Record refined gallium output
        - id: "2.2"
          title: Record purity (%)
          order: 2
          roles:
            - analyst
          inputKey: purityPct
          inputType: formata
          schema:
            type: object
            properties:
              purityPct:
                type: number
                title: purityPct
            required:
            - purityPct
            title: Record purity percentage
    - id: "3"
      title: QA + Notarize
      order: 3
      organization: organization-3
      substeps:
        - id: "3.1"
          title: QA sign-off
          order: 1
          roles:
            - qainspector
          inputKey: qaChecklist
          inputType: formata
          schema:
            type: object
            required: [inspectorName, result, purityScore, riskBand]
            properties:
              inspectorName:
                type: string
                title: Inspector name
              testMethod:
                type: string
                title: Test method
                enum: [xrf, icp_ms, wet_chemistry, visual_only]
              result:
                type: string
                title: QA result
                enum: [pass, conditional_pass, rework, reject]
              riskBand:
                type: string
                title: Risk band
                enum: [low, medium, high, critical]
              purityScore:
                type: number
                title: Purity score (range 0-100)
                minimum: 0
                maximum: 100
              confidenceLevel:
                type: integer
                title: Confidence level (range 1-5)
                minimum: 1
                maximum: 5
              notes:
                type: string
                title: QA notes
              evidenceFile:
                type: string
                format: data-url
                title: Evidence file
          uiSchema:
            ui:options:
              order: [inspectorName, testMethod, result, riskBand, purityScore, confidenceLevel, notes, evidenceFile]
            testMethod:
              ui:options:
                help: Select how QA validation was performed.
            riskBand:
              ui:options:
                help: Choose the risk classification for this batch.
            purityScore:
              ui:components:
                numberWidget: rangeWidget
              ui:options:
                help: Numeric range value between 0 and 100.
            confidenceLevel:
              ui:components:
                numberWidget: rangeWidget
              ui:options:
                help: Numeric range value between 1 and 5.
            notes:
              ui:components:
                textWidget: textareaWidget
              ui:options:
                help: Write a detailed QA narrative and exceptions.
            evidenceFile:
              ui:components:
                stringField: fileField
              ui:options:
                help: Upload QA evidence.
        - id: "3.2"
          title: Finalize notarization
          order: 2
          roles:
            - qainspector
          inputKey: finalHash
          inputType: formata
          schema:
            type: object
            properties:
              finalHash:
                type: string
                title: finalHash
            required:
              - finalHash
            title: Final hash

organizations:
  - slug: organization-1
    name: Organization 1
  - slug: organization-2
    name: Organization 2
  - slug: organization-3
    name: Organization 3

roles:
  - orgSlug: organization-1
    slug: chemist
    name: Chemist
    color: var(--role-blue-bg)
    border: var(--role-blue-border)
  - orgSlug: organization-1
    slug: mechanic
    name: Mechanic
    color: var(--role-blue-bg)
    border: var(--role-blue-border)
  - orgSlug: organization-1
    slug: supervisor
    name: Supervisor
    color: var(--role-cyan-bg)
    border: var(--role-cyan-border)
  - orgSlug: organization-2
    slug: analyst
    name: Analyst
    color: var(--role-emerald-bg)
    border: var(--role-emerald-border)
  - orgSlug: organization-3
    slug: qainspector
    name: QA Inspector
    color: var(--role-pink-bg)
    border: var(--role-pink-border)

dpp:
  enabled: true
  gtin: "09506000134352"
  lotInputKey: batchId
  lotDefault: ""
  serialInputKey: ""
  serialStrategy: ""
  productName: Recycled Gallium Batch
  productDescription: Gallium intake and refinement process with notarized checkpoints.
  ownerName: Attesta Demo Operator
